title: Chapter 5
content:
Chapter 5: Sleep in My Room!

After eating dinner, Denzel exited the house and was outside looking up at the night sky

’The sky is still the same as in my previous world...beautiful as ever’ Denzel said with a smile on his face

’After looking deeper into the old Denzel’s memories I was able to figure out important things about this family’

’His dad was a drunkard who was a good for nothing. He never contributed to the house and only used their saved up funds and finally he ended up leaving them behind and going to start a new life where ever he is’

’Well, since they are not my family that doesn’t really matter to me. What really matters is that this happened about few years ago and since then Maria hasn’t had any form of sexual pleasure and Sophia too has never been with a man all her life’

’That just means that they both haven’t experienced real orgasm or a real kiss and once they eventually find out what it feels like, I doubt they will be able to run away from it and that would make them fully mine’

’But in order to corrupt them and fully claim them for myself, I’ll need the help of that...’

"Status" he said out loud and a transparent window from his system popped out in front of him.

’I really didnt have to say it out loud, even if I just thought of it it would have still popped out’

[Name: Denzel Ridrat]

[Age: 22 years]

[Strength: 10]

[Agility: 10]

[Sense: 10]

[Vitality: 10]

[Stamina: 10]

[Mana: 10/10]

[Rank: E]

[Harem: 0]

[Taboo points: 0]

[Skills: Stimulation (E)]

Denzel ran down through his status with his eyes until he got to the skill section and focused on it bringing out more description about the skill

[Skill: Stimulation]

[Description: Player’s touch heightens the sensitivity of a females body upon touch]

[Mana Consumption: 5 mana per usage]

[Time Limit: 15 mins]

[Cooldown: 2 hours]

’I can only use the skill for a duration of 15mins with a cooldown of 2hours. And it consumes 5 mana per use, that means I can use it twice before my mana bank runs down to zero. Not bad, its definitely something I can work with’

’I now have to think about when and how to use this skill and most importantly who am I going to use it on first. Hehe’ he thought as a cheeky smile drew across his face.

*Click*

"Denzel... is this where you have been all these while" Maria asked, her voice smooth and angelic as she glanced over her shoulder towards Denzel

"Just wanted to look at the night sky. Mom. It looks beautiful tonight, nothing else" Denzel replied back

’Mom, that still sounds weird considering she’s not actually my real mother’ he thought

"I’ll be going to bed now" Denzel told Maria

Maria arched before chuckling

"Alright Denzel, you go ahead. Once I’m done with the dishes I’ll be going to bed too" Maria said as she turned and moved towards the kitchen

As she moved towards the kitchen, Denzel’s eyes locked onto the sway of her massive plum round ass, the soft curves shifting with every step she made. Heat was already surging through Denzel’s body and his cock wasn’t silent

’Shit...my dick is already throbbing and ready to explode just by looking at her. With that fat ass, yeah she is definitely going to be my first target’

He flexed his fingers as he covered the growing bulge in his pants and headed to his room.

--

Open

Shut

The sound of door to Denzel’s room echoed as Denzel stepped in with a mug of water in his hands. He gulped the water from the mug till he was satisfied and sat on his bed

A faint smile was still visible on his lips, his mind roaming and planning within his mind.

’I know I said they were all mine but that’s just all talk, I have to plan on how to actually make them mine’

’This skill I has already made it easy to make women submit to me compared to how hard it was to smooth talk my way into getting women in my old world’

"Ahhhhhhhhhhh"

As he was lost in thoughts a loud scream brought him back to reality.

’What the hell was that, it sounds like it came from inside the house. What’s going on’ thought as he stood up from his bed and proceeded to his door to check out what was going on

Before he could open the door, it was already opening and moving towards his direction fast, he took a quick step back and barely avoided the door hitting his face.

And in front of him was none other than his sexy elder sister, Sophia.

"Denzel! Denzel!...I....I just...saw a....RAT!!!!!" Sophia was panting heavily and wasn’t able to join her words

She was dressed in a night gown that was loose but clung tightly to her massive tits almost like it was about to rip and as she opened the door in a haste her tits bounced in all directions

’Damn, what amazing tits. Still can’t get over how perfect they are’

But Denzel snapped back quickly to his target in distress and he got the idea of what she was talking about, it was probably a rat in her room

"Calm down, Soph–"

Before he could finish, Sophia circled behind him and clung closely to his body her massive tits pressing hard on his back

’What the hell, so soft and perky. Is that her nipples...she has no goddamn bra on. Damn, those titties are really soft’

He took a deep breath

’Calm down Denzel. You have to be the man of the house and take control of the situation’

He turned around and held her by her shoulders as she looked up at him. Her eyes were wet, she was already crying from seeing a rat in her room.

"Calm down, Sophia it’s just a rat. Stay here I’ll go chase it out of your room"

After saying that he turned and was about to move towards her room but she dragged his shirt and pulled him back.

"Don’t go, Denzel. I...I...know you...don’t like it but...can I sleep....sleep in your room this night" Sophia said shyly with her head face down

’Sleep in my room! Why wouldn’t I like it and how the fuck did I not think of that, I almost became a superhero killing a rat while I could have this slutty bitch in my room all night long’

Denzel turned and hugged her and milk swollen tits once again pressed on his chest. His cock already throbbing

"It’s okay, you can sleep in my room tonight. I’m here for you" Denzel spoke

’Hehe, I’m going to have my way with Sophia this night. What a great night this is going to be’
